expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers highlight activation, persistence, deselection, and interaction safety for bar chart and heatmap
expectations.evidence: The outputs explicitly state the case focus cannot be verified due to missing Phase 5b artifacts: execution_notes.md: "Could not verify the benchmark’s case focus (highlight activation/persistence/deselection/interaction safety for bar chart + heatmap) because no Phase 5b run artifacts were included in the evidence set." result.md: "There is no Phase 5b output evidence ... to verify that Phase 5b actually enforced shipment checkpoints for the specified highlight behaviors on bar chart and heatmap."

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The produced result is explicitly framed as a Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement evaluation and references Phase 5b rubric/contract requirements and expected Phase 5b artifacts. execution_notes.md: "Benchmark checkpoint: phase5b alignment - Verified contract requirements for Phase 5b outputs and dispositions from review-rubric-phase5b.md." result.md title: "Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement" and section "What can be confirmed from evidence (contract alignment only)" listing required Phase 5b outputs and dispositions.
